channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Epiphone Jack Casady Signature Bass Fretless 2024 - Present - Aged Royal Tan — $560
item.description:
$560 · Very Good · Alex's Gear Locker

Epiphone Jack Casady Signature Fretless Bass — Aged Royal Tan


No Offers

No returns


Great condition. Lightly played. The first-ever fretless version of the iconic Jack Casady Signature Bass — a relatively rare find on the used market.


JCB-1 low-impedance humbucker, 3-position VariTone control, 34" scale fretless laurel board. All controls function properly. Original strings.


Added bridge string extender bar — keeps silk wraps clear of the saddles cleanly.


Comes with original Epiphone gig bag. The stand pictured isn't included.


See photos for condition. Additional images available on request.


Thank you for your interest!

item.title: Ibanez SGR 2001 - Sunburst — $900
item.description:
$900 · Excellent · Old's Cool Gear

This is a pretty stunning tobacco burst 5 string with active pickups that is just phenomenal to play and sounds even better! I suggest fine tuning it to your liking but's ready to gig as-is. And a GORGEOUS plush interior hardshell case. (Strap included) .

It's a must see /must play..

Asking 900 o.b.o.

item.title: Fender American Professional II Jazz Bass Olympic White with Maple Fretboard — $1,812.42
item.description:
$1,812.42 · Excellent · Tim's Bass Barn

Fender American Professional II Jazz Bass with Fender hard case, case candy and Fender cotton/suede strap. Mint condition, alder body in Olympic white and tort pickguard with gloss maple fretboard with an amazing fast slim satin neck.

Purchased from Bass Centre Melbourne in December 2024 and never gigged. Professionally set up in January 2025 and not played since. Original set of Fender 7250 45-105 roundwounds installed through the body, action is low and neck is straight. Good weight at 4.0kgs.

I have been playing Stingrays with my current band since 2025, so this bass and its Precision equivalent have been sitting in their cases not being used. I am expecting some new instruments soon, so these greats basses need to go to make room.

Located Townsville / North Queensland and can freight anywhere in Australia at buyers expense. No swaps or exchanges. Can do a deal if you are buying both the Precision and the Jazz. Any questions not answered above, please message.

item.title: Fender American Professional II Precision Bass Olympic White with Maple Fretboard — $1,747.43
item.description:
$1,747.43 · Excellent · Tim's Bass Barn

Fender American Professional II Precision Bass with Fender hard case, case candy and Fender cotton/suede strap. Excellent condition, alder body in Olympic white and tort pickguard with gloss maple fretboard with an amazing satin neck

Purchased from Bass Centre Melbourne in June 2024 and only gigged twice in December 2024 and January 2025. Professionally set up in January 2025 and not played since. Fresh set of Fender 7250 45-105 roundwounds installed through the body at set up, action is low and neck is straight. Good weight at 4.1kgs.

I have been playing Stingrays with my current band since 2025, so this bass and its Jazz equivalent have been sitting in their cases not being used. I am expecting some new instruments soon, so these greats basses need to go to make room.

Located Townsville / North Queensland and can freight anywhere in Australia at buyers expense. No swaps or exchanges. Can do a deal if you are buying both the Precision and the Jazz. Any questions not answered above, please message.

item.title: Peavey Fury — $350
item.description:
$350 · Very Good · wwplaya

Peavey Fury bass- 4-string, re body and   marching headstock (as original), Precision pickups, maple neck, in good physical and working condition $350.

item.title: Fodera Emperor 5 Deluxe 2024 - Japanese Maple — $11,500
item.description:
$11,500 · Excellent · Guitars Etc.

Bought new from the dealer in 2024. Dark background pics are from the original listing. Rug background pics were taken on 30JUN26. Body/neck are in exceptional condition. Bass comes with original hard case, tools, and documentation.

Ships fully insured with Reverb safe shipping.

Body
• Model: Emperor
• Wood: Swamp Ash
• Top: Japanese Maple
• Finish: Satin

Neck
• Wood: 3-Pieces Hard-Rock Maple
• Shape: Standard
• Finish: Satin 
• String Spacing: 19 mm
• Scale Length: 34” 
• Nut: Bronze

Fretboard
• Wood: Ebony
• Radius: Compound-Radius (9"–20")
• Frets: 24

Electronics
• Pickups: Fodera / S. Duncan Dual Coils ('60)
• Preamp: Fodera / M. Pope Custom

Hardware
• Tuners: Fodera / Hipshot 
• Bridge: Fodera Custom
• Color: Black

Weight: 9.2 lbs.

item.title: Warwick Limited Edition # 3 of 168 "Bleached Blonde" Thumb Bolt-On BO 4-string Bass with Gig Bag 2003 — $2,899
item.description:
$2,899 · Very Good · Atomic Music

This is a pre-owned/used instrument available as shown for local delivery, pickup at our storefront (curbside or in store) in Beltsville, Maryland, or shipment to those in the lower 48/USA only via UPS Ground [a signature will be required for delivery]*.

  • Its electronics have been tested and function 100% as they should.
  • See the provided pix for best idea of overall cosmetic condition. As it is pre-owned, it has likely acquired surface marks and wear (dings, dents, scratches, scuffs, smudges, etc.) from play/use - all purely cosmetic in nature. There are no issues to note with regard to functionality and playability.
  • Its original gig bag will be included, as shown.  No other extras are available for this item.
  • This listing has been created for the benefit of our local customers.  There may be cosmetic or functional issues that the pictures alone cannot capture — if you are not able to come by and inspect this instrument in person, please be sure to ask any relevant questions you may have regarding its condition, playability, etc. before buying.

* Please be aware that humidity, temperature, and handling can affect guitars & basses such that adjustments to the instrument might be needed post-shipment. This includes "fret sprout" (as wood can shrink/swell during shipment, a fretted instrument may arrive with sharp fret edges). If tweaking action, intonation, etc., having fret edges dressed, or having the instrument set up to your specs is not something you are comfortable with doing yourself, you will need the help of a local-to-you tech/professional. Note that any associated fees incurred for their time and labor will be your responsibility.

Please contact us to discuss any other questions you may have about it before clicking the "Add To Cart" button!


Atomic Music store hours:  12pm - 6pm, EST, Monday - Saturday & 12pm - 5pm, EST, Sundays.

Thanks!!

- Atomic Music

item.title: Schecter Diamond Series Studio-6 VI 6-string Bass 2024 — $849
item.description:
$849 · Excellent · Atomic Music

  • Its electronics have been tested and function 100% as they should.
  • See the provided pix for best idea of overall cosmetic condition. As it is pre-owned, it has likely acquired surface marks and wear (dings, dents, scratches, scuffs, smudges, etc.) from play/use - all purely cosmetic in nature. There are no issues to note with regard to functionality and playability.
  • A generic gig bag [not pictured] will be included.  No other extras are available for this item.
  • This listing has been created for the benefit of our local customers.  There may be cosmetic or functional issues that the pictures alone cannot capture — if you are not able to come by and inspect this instrument in person, please be sure to ask any relevant questions you may have regarding its condition, playability, etc. before buying.

* Please be aware that humidity, temperature, and handling can affect guitars & basses such that adjustments to the instrument might be needed post-shipment. This includes "fret sprout" (as wood can shrink/swell during shipment, a fretted instrument may arrive with sharp fret edges). If tweaking action, intonation, etc., having fret edges dressed, or having the instrument set up to your specs is not something you are comfortable with doing yourself, you will need the help of a local-to-you tech/professional. Note that any associated fees incurred for their time and labor will be your responsibility.

Please contact us to discuss any other questions you may have about it before clicking the "Add To Cart" button!


Atomic Music store hours:  12pm - 6pm, EST, Monday - Saturday & 12pm - 5pm, EST, Sundays.

Thanks!!

- Atomic Music

item.title: Ibanez SR1600B-TSF Premium Soundgear 2020 - 2021 - Tropical Seafloor Flat — $895
item.description:
$895 · Very Good · dean's Gear Depot

Ibanez sr-1600 B in lightly used condition.Few surface light scratches.Great action-bought new. Ibanez gig bag incl. Shipping to CONUS only

item.title: Rickenbacker 4001 Mapleglo 1973 ('72 spec) — $3,606.78
item.description:
$3,606.78 · Fair · Joel's Vintage Guitars

Now available, a 1973 Rickenbacker 4001 bass in its original Maple-glo finish.

This example of a 4001 bass is among the last with the checkerboard binding and the toaster neck pickup. It features a solid maple body with neck-through construction, rosewood fingerboard, a horse shoe high gain pickup in the bridge, and a 33.25" scale length.

The bass recently suffered a headstock break which didn't go all the way through, this has since been professionally repaired by Sydney luthier Piers Crocker and is rock solid. Otherwise the frets, nut, input jacks, switch, and tuners have been replaced. There is a decent amount of play wear, however its presents in good cosmetic shape overall. Both truss rods work perfectly, and the neck is straight with some relief towards the lower frets. The frets are in decent shape as well with typical wear in the first few positions.

Overall a great playing Rickenbacker 4001 at an approachable price, includes a modern Rickenbacker hardcase.

--- Joel's Vintage Guitars is a by appointment vintage & used guitar store located in Sydney, Australia.

All prices are higher to accommodate Reverb fees.

We ship WORLDWIDE! ---

item.title: Custom 4 String Electric Bass, Basswood Body with Maple Neck — $397.79
item.description:
$397.79 · Excellent · Myles Music Shop

Custom 4 String Electric Bass, Basswood Body with Maple Neck


fingerboard: technical wood


neck: okoume wood


Machine Head: Chrome Diecast


Finish: matte

item.title: Luna 4 String Acoustic Electric Bass, Spruce Top Body, Mahogany Neck, Rosewood Fingerboard — $187.99
item.description:
$187.99 · Very Good · Myles Music Shop

: Spruce top, mahogany back and sides, plywood body, sunset color. Mahogany neck, rosewood fingerboard, genuine LUNA American brand, equipped with Korean-made active pickups. Battery powered.

item.title: Peavey Cirrus 5 String — $789
item.description:
$789 · Fair · Brick Wall Guitars

Awesome bass but does have some minor neck twist. Still plays okay and can achieve solid action, but neck twist causes some bowing in in frets 2-8 when it’s normally more toward middle.

Bass looks good overall cosmetically but does have plenty of wear tear mostly on headstock.

Electronics are working and sound great, but original owner said he replaced some pots.

Bass is sold as is for someone who can deal with the quirks or is interested in attempting repair.

Final sale. Information about neck is in ad, can’t help further diagnose.

item.title: Cort Space 4 Artisan Headless — $429
item.description:
$429 · Good · Brick Wall Guitars

Sweet bass. Very easy to play and well built.

Cosmetic Condition:

Looks great. Shows minimal signs of play. Has some spots on edge but can’t tell if it’s dings or part of the natural finish.

Players Notes:

Plays well with good action. Everything in good working order. Straight neck and good frets.


***Ships quickly and securely, we pride ourselves on our excellent record of safe delivery. Instruments come set up unless otherwise noted, but may need fine tuning for your personal preferences. Most instruments ship signature required. Payment due within 24 hours unless otherwise agreed upon. Please message with any specific questions and we will be happy to help. Thank you for looking, be sure to check our page for more great listings!***


Continental US only, no PO Boxes on Guitar/Bass orders. We do not trade online. All contact is through Reverb messages only.

item.title: *2006* Epiphone Les Paul Special Bass Red Flame — $299
item.description:
$299 · Fair · Brick Wall Guitars

Cool bass in players grade shape. More details below.

Cosmetic Condition:

Most of bass looks pretty good but someone drilled in an attachment for tuner of some kind at headstock. This left two holes on back and a little poking through on front. Aside from that has some chipping to headstock and some denting in various areas.

Players Notes:

Plays well with good action. Everything in good working order. Straight neck and good frets. Weighs 8lbs 9oz.

***Ships quickly and securely, we pride ourselves on our excellent record of safe delivery. Instruments come set up unless otherwise noted, but may need fine tuning for your personal preferences. Most instruments ship signature required. Payment due within 24 hours unless otherwise agreed upon. Please message with any specific questions and we will be happy to help. Thank you for looking, be sure to check our page for more great listings!***


Continental US only, no PO Boxes on Guitar/Bass orders. We do not trade online. All contact is through Reverb messages only.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special - Purple Sunset / Rosewood - 2025 - 7lb 12oz — $2,300
item.description:
$2,300 · Excellent · Savannah Bass

One of the lightest StingRay Specials you'll find. Purple Sunset is a striking colorway that turns heads, and at 7lb 12oz this plays and wears all night without fatigue.

This is the modern StingRay done right: same iconic punch and clarity, refined ergonomics, and the neodymium humbucker with 18V preamp that cuts through any mix effortlessly.

Specs:

  • 4-string, 34" scale
  • Purple Sunset finish / Indian Rosewood fingerboard
  • 2025
  • Neodymium humbucker, 18V active preamp
  • Weight: 7lb 12oz
  • Comes with original Mono gigbag

Condition: Excellent to Mint — clean, fully functional, zero issues.

Ships insured and packed properly.

item.title: Sterling Stingray 5 HH RAYHH. 2024 - High gloss — $400
item.description:
$400 · Excellent · T S Custom Guitars

No dings. No scratches. Cobra blue. Upgraded tuners to Hipshot ultra lite USA tuners. Upgraded to bass nut and brass saddles. Added mother of pearl pickguard. Upgraded string tree. Played very little. Reason for selling: I am now disabled and cannot handle the weight. Love this dearly. Sounds great. Shipping original tuners with it.

item.title: Fender American Deluxe Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2002 - 2003 - Black — $1,396.13
item.description:
$1,396.13 · Very Good · Mark’s Stuff

Selling my Fender American Deluxe Precision Bass (USA, early 2000s) in classic black with a rosewood board. This is the higher-end USA P-Bass with the factory active electronics and P + humbucker configuration — way more tonal range than a standard P, and sits perfectly in both studio and live mixes. - comes with original hard case
- Recently professionally serviced by Doc at Stang Guitars in Edmonton, AB
- Plays clean and fast with great action
- Electronics are quiet and fully functional
- Overall excellent condition
Aside from normal wear you'd expect to see on a 25 year old instrument, the only flaw is a small finish chip on the top of the neck — purely cosmetic and doesn’t affect playability. See picture. This is a killer instrument if you want a modern, versatile P-Bass that can cover everything from clean studio tones to aggressive rock/metal. Sad to be letting it go!

For USA buyers: Buyer responsible for any import duties, taxes, and brokerage fees.

item.title: BC Rich Warlock Bass-Platinum Series-Double P Pickup-Korean Made — $449
item.description:
$449 · Good · LA Guitar Network

BC Rich Warlock Bass, Part of the Platinum Series of instruments. These were Made in Korea and feature a high mass bridge and sealed tuners. Feels like a quality instrument, truss adjusts with ease. I believe these came in either PJ or Double P pickup layout like this one. The Double P is pretty cool and sounds great. You have a volume control for each P pickup, a 3 way selector to isolate either or run them together and a master tone. The neck is straight, the action low and the playability great. The condition is good with just the general wear of a used pointy instrument. By that I mean the body points do have some chips please see photos, the headstock also has a chipped point. Seems like any pointy guitar I've had suffers the same fate, although these aren't to terrible. There are also various other small dings, scratches etc.Although these are of course just cosmetics. I believe this bass to be around 2005, the platinum series BC Rich instruments are notoriously hard to date, the serial number was just random and there is no database for them. The electronics were just cleaned with Deoxit D5, to keep them issue free and smooth. I also oiled the fretboard. The strings are GHS Boomers and are rather dead, if you like the zing of fresh strings I would recommend a new set. The frets themselves are in great shape leading me to believe this bass wasn't played much. I do not have a case for it but I will package well, wrapping the bass entirely in bubble wrap.


[Orders are shipped out ASAP -within under 24 hours with Insured Shipping. Packaged professionally with proper packaging supplies and box. I only use FedEx or UPS and I will NOT ship to PO Boxes. Once an item ships the address cannot be changed per Reverbs own guidelines, please make sure your address is correct as this is on you. Signature required for all shipments ]

item.title: Ibanez BTB605LTGF BTB Standard 5-String Electric Bass Transparent Gray Flat Lefty Pre-Order — $949.99
item.description:
$949.99 · Brand New · Chicago Music Exchange

Without a doubt, your instrument should reflect the dedication you place in your musicianship and creative endeavors. At a certain point, the word ”boutique” comes to mind: Select-grade materials, neck-thru construction, and top quality components, all in a meticulously combined into a stunning pro-level instrument. But what about the upfront investment of such an instrument? That's where Ibanez comes in. Our ability to build small-shop quality, into inspiring yet affordable instruments, is showcased in droves with BTB series basses.



General:
Brand Name: Ibanez
Case Type: Case Not Included
Hand Orientation: Left-Handed
Hardware Color: Cosmo black
Number of Strings: 5-String
Product Color: Transparent Gray Flat
Series: Ibanez Standard

Body:
Body Finish: Satin Polyurethane
Body Material: Okoume wing

Neck:
Fingerboard Inlay: White dot
Fingerboard Material: Rosewood
Neck Finish: Satin Polyurethane
Neck Joint: Neck-through
Neck Material: 5pc Maple/Jatoba
Neck Notes: (+ zero fret)
Neck Shape: BTB5
Neck Thickness (in): 20mm at 1st, 22mm at 12th
Number of Frets: 24 Frets
Nut Material: Plastic
Nut Width: 47mm

Electronics:
Bridge Pickup: Î±1
Controls and Switching: 1 Volume, 1 Balancer, Bass, Middle, Treble
Electronics Notes: Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ & 3-way Mid frequency switch
Neck Pickup: Î±1

Hardware:
Bridge: MR5
Fret Wire: Medium
Saddle Material: Metal
Tuning Machines: Ibanez machine heads

item.title: Ibanez SR305EDXFDM SR Standard 5-String Electric Bass Frozen Gold Matte Pre-Order — $529.99
item.description:
$529.99 · Brand New · Chicago Music Exchange

For 30 years the SR has given bass players a modern alternative. With its continued popularity, Ibanez is constantly endeavoring to answer the wider needs of a variety of players, at a variety of budgets. But no matter what the specs, the heart is the same-SR continues to excite with its smooth, fast neck, lightweight body, and perfectly matched electronics.



General:
Brand Name: Ibanez
Case Type: Case Not Included
Hardware Color: Gold
Number of Strings: 5-String
Product Color: Frozen Gold Matte
Series: Ibanez Standard

Body:
Body Finish: Satin Polyurethane
Body Material: Nyatoh

Neck:
Fingerboard Inlay: White dot
Fingerboard Material: Jatoba
Neck Finish: Satin Polyurethane
Neck Joint: Bolt-on
Neck Material: 5pc Maple/Walnut
Neck Shape: SR5
Neck Thickness (in): 20mm at 1st, 22mm at 12th
Number of Frets: 24 Frets
Nut Material: Plastic
Nut Width: 45mm

Electronics:
Bridge Pickup: PowerSpan Dual Coil
Controls and Switching: 1 Volume, 1 Balancer, Bass, Middle, Treble
Electronics Notes: Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ & 3-way Power Tap switch
Neck Pickup: PowerSpan Dual Coil

Hardware:
Bridge: Accu-cast B505
Fret Wire: Medium
Saddle Material: Metal
Tuning Machines: Ibanez machine heads

item.title: Ibanez GSR205BMT Gio SR 5-String Electric Bass Blue Moon Burst Pre-Order — $299.99
item.description:
$299.99 · Brand New · Chicago Music Exchange

For 30 years the SR has given bass players a modern alternative. With its continued popularity, Ibanez is constantly endeavoring to answer the wider needs of a variety of players, at a variety of budgets. But no matter what the specs, the heart is the same-SR continues to excite with its smooth, fast neck, lightweight body, and perfectly matched electronics.



General:
Brand Name: Ibanez
Case Type: Case Not Included
Hardware Color: Chrome
Number of Strings: 5-String
Product Color: Blue Moon Burst
Series: Ibanez Gio

Body:
Body Finish: Gloss Polyurethane
Body Material: Poplar

Neck:
Fingerboard Inlay: White dot
Fingerboard Material: Jatoba
Neck Finish: Satin Polyurethane
Neck Joint: Bolt-on
Neck Material: Maple
Neck Shape: GSR5
Neck Thickness (in): 21mm at 1st, 22mm at 12th
Number of Frets: 22 Frets
Nut Material: Plastic
Nut Width: 45mm

Electronics:
Bridge Pickup: Dynamix H
Controls and Switching: 2 Volume, 1 Tone, Phat II
Electronics Notes: Phat II EQ
Neck Pickup: Dynamix H

Hardware:
Bridge: B15
Fret Wire: Medium
Saddle Material: Metal
Tuning Machines: Ibanez machine heads

item.title: Ibanez GSR200BMT Gio SR Electric Bass Blue Moon Burst Pre-Order — $249.99
item.description:
$249.99 · Brand New · Chicago Music Exchange

For 30 years the SR has given bass players a modern alternative. With its continued popularity, Ibanez is constantly endeavoring to answer the wider needs of a variety of players, at a variety of budgets. But no matter what the specs, the heart is the same-SR continues to excite with its smooth, fast neck, lightweight body, and perfectly matched electronics.



General:
Brand Name: Ibanez
Case Type: Case Not Included
Hardware Color: Chrome
Number of Strings: 4-String
Product Color: Blue Moon Burst
Series: Ibanez Gio

Body:
Body Finish: Gloss Polyurethane
Body Material: Poplar

Neck:
Fingerboard Inlay: White dot
Fingerboard Material: Jatoba
Neck Finish: Satin Polyurethane
Neck Joint: Bolt-on
Neck Material: Maple
Neck Shape: GSR4
Neck Thickness (in): 21mm at 1st, 22mm at 12th
Number of Frets: 22 Frets
Nut Material: Plastic
Nut Width: 41mm

Electronics:
Bridge Pickup: Dynamix J
Controls and Switching: 2 Volume, 1 Tone, Phat II
Electronics Notes: Phat II EQ
Neck Pickup: Dynamix P

Hardware:
Bridge: B10
Fret Wire: Medium
Saddle Material: Metal

With its continued popularity, Ibanez is constantly endeavoring to answer the wider needs of a variety of players, at a variety of budgets. item.title: Ibanez EHB600LWNF EHB Ergonomic Headless Bass Walnut Flat Lefty Pre-Order — $899.99
item.description:
$899.99 · Brand New · Chicago Music Exchange

The EHB’s headless construction, contoured body and ergonomic design make for a lightweight and comfortable instrument that’s excellent for long sets or practice sessions. This series also sports a combination of high-quality tone woods and versatile electronics, resulting in a cutting-edge, ultra-modern bass, capable of cutting though the complex landscape of tones required for today’s bassist.

item.title: Ibanez AEB305-LG-OP-03 5-String Acoustic-Electric Bass — $325
item.description:
$325 · Very Good · Bob's Bass Bunker

One owner, all original Ibanez AEB-305 LG acoustic electric 5-string bass with original case. Very good condition with only a few dings near the strumming area. Beautiful, mellow sound acoustic or electric via the piezo-electric pickup. New B-string.

item.title: Fender Fretless Jazz Bass 80’s - Sunburst — $495
item.description:
$495 · Good · Don’s Gear Locker

This listing is for someone that does their own work, such as set up’s, cleaning controls, and minor things. If you are that person, read on.

I’ve had this for awhile, and just never got around to learning the Fretless method. This is a fairly early model of the MIM series, red label case, very few Fender markings. The bass itself is in great shape, might need control minor cleaning as it has been setting. They do work. the original case is another story. The frame is slightly sprung making the latches hard to close. You have to learn “the drill” here. Certain ones first, push, etc. It is secure once closed. As far as the Fretless thing is concerned keep in mind the neck could always be swapped out. Priced to sell, this one needs a new home and some YLC. Shipping is FREE. Listing is open the the US Lower 48 Only! NO INTERNATIONAL SHIPPING! Sorry

item.title: Washburn WCBM15SEK Comfort Series Solid Cedar Top, Armrest Mahogany Neck 4-String Acoustic-Electric Mini Bass Guitar w/Gig Bag — $499
item.description:
$499 · Brand New · The Gator Tone

Washburn’s Comfort Series is built around one idea: every detail should make the instrument feel better, play easier, and inspire more music. The WCBM15SEK Mini Comfort Bass brings that philosophy to a compact, travel‑friendly acoustic‑electric bass designed for effortless playability and surprisingly full low‑end response.

This satin‑finished “Mini” bass features a solid cedar top paired with striped ebony back and sides, a tonewood combination chosen for warmth, clarity, and rich harmonic depth. Walnut binding accents the body, while the Comfort Series armrest and sculpted Carve‑Away work together to reduce fatigue and keep you playing longer.

Barcus‑Berry electronics provide reliable, stage‑ready amplified tone, and the Aquila bass strings deliver a balanced, expressive voice right out of the box.

Despite its smaller footprint, the WCBM15SEK produces a surprisingly big, musical low end — perfect for recording, couch playing, or taking on the road. Gig bag included.

Specifications:

Body & Construction

  • Back: Striped Ebony.
  • Bracing: Quarter-Sawn Scalloped Sitka Spruce.
  • Rosette: Washburn Parquet, 3-Ring.
  • Body Shape: G Mini.
  • Sides: Striped Ebony.
  • Top: Solid Cedar with Armrest.
  • Type: Mini Bass.

Neck

  • Fretboard: Laurel.
  • Inlays: Dots.
  • Neck: Satin Mahogany with 2-Way Truss Rod.
  • Number of Frets: 20.
  • Nut: NuBone.
  • Scale Length: 28.6".

Other

  • Color: Natural Matte.
  • Finish: Satin.
  • Strings: Aquila.
  • Includes: Gig Bag.

item.title: Sadowsky Metroline Vintage PJ 21-4 (JAPAN) 2008 - Olympic White — $2,531.40
item.description:
$2,531.40 · Excellent · Mike's Bass Shop

Pick Up-Sadowsky Precision + Jazz

Active/passive with VTC Sadowsky pre-amp.

Body-Alder

Neck-Maple

Fretboard-Morado

Made in Japan (pre-Warwick) 2008-MV5052

Comes with Sadowsky hard case + additional pickguard (pictured)

There is a slight bend in the installed pickguard (photo provided) and does not affect the playing in any way and is only visible from the players view. The additional included pickguard is perfectly straight.

item.title: Roscoe Classic Series Jazz Bass 2017 - Seafoam Green — $2,531.40
item.description:
$2,531.40 · Excellent · Mike's Bass Shop

Classic 4JJ Serial #0061c Poplar body, Seafoam Green finish, Aguilar 4J-HC pickups, Aguilar OBP-1 preamp w/active-passive switching & passive tone control, Graphite-reinforced Maple neck, Maple fingerboard.

The Roscoe Guitars Classic series.

We proudly introduce Roscoe Guitars "CLASSIC SERIES" bass guitars based on the all time classics in the world of electric bass guitars.

The "CLASSIC SERIES" is based of the designs that set the standard both in live and studio performance used by many of the great players over the years. Our new "CLASSIC SERIES" of electric bass guitars builds on that design aesthetic with the handcrafted attention to build quality and detail that Roscoe Guitars is world famous for.

This Classic neck is graphite reinforced Maple neck with Pau Ferro fingerboard with dot inlays.

Includes matching strap

item.title: Sadowsky RV5 Metroline (Japan) 2009 - 59 Sunburst — $2,931.87
item.description:
$2,931.87 · Excellent · Mike's Bass Shop

  • Sleek undersized J body shape
  • Alder body
  • Thicker headstock and graphite strips dramatically reduce dead spots and create a more even response on every note
  • Morado fingerboard
  • 1 7/8” on 5-string
  • 21 18% nickel/silver frets .094″ wide x .051″ high, maximum hardness
  • Hipshot Ultralight on 5 string
  • Sadowsky Humcancelling J pickups (60’s location)
  • Classic Sadowsky Treble and Bass boost pre-amp with true bypass switch
  • Controls: master vol, pickup blend, treble roll-off (VTC) with pre-amp bypass, bass boost, treble boost
  • Sadowsky bridge with quick release

item.title: Sadowsky NYC Custom 2007 Special Order Model, 24 Fret 5-String Active Bass w/Original Case — $6,951.70
item.description:
$6,951.70 · Excellent · Gakkido Co., Ltd.

This rare 5-string from the world renowned Luthier Sadowsky's NYC Custom line is an incredible instrument that offers extremely low-noise and an amazing sound range. It's specifications are a one of a kind order for a Japanese shop to commemorate their 10th anniversary.

Its ash body adorns an exotic burl top with gloss finish. The satin finished 1-piece maple neck is dressed with an ebony fingerboard featuring 24 frets and abolone inlays.

The original soapbar pickups have a wide range complimented by a potent set of controls including balancer, passive tone with push pull to bypass the preamp, and a stacked trebel/bass boost knob.

CONDITION
This used bass has some very light surface wear to the finish but is in great condition with neck in wonderful shape. Some average fret wear can be seen, but the guitar is professionally setup with optimal playability. The rectangular shape seen on the body's back is a scratch guard.
All photos are of the actual item.
Listing includes the original softcase and a bonus Gibson brand hardcase. Inside are the original clear pickguard, Roger Sadowsky COA with signature, and message card for Shop's anniversary commemoration.

SPECIFICATION
BODY : 2-Piece Burl Top, 2-Piece Ash Back
NECK : 1-Piece Maple, C-Shape, Bolt-On Joint
NECK WIDTH : 44.8mm at Nut, 66.8mm at 12F
FINGERBOARD : Ebony, 24 Frets, Abalone Dot Inlays
SCALE : 34", Long Scale
PICKUPS : 2 x Sadowsky Soapbar
PREAMP : Sadowsky Original
CONTROLS : Master Volume, Balancer, Vintage Tone (Pull Preamp Bypass), Treble/Bass +13db Boost (Stacked)
TUNERS : Hipshot
STRINGS PITCH : approx. 18.8mm
HARDWARE : Black
FINISH : Gloss on Body, Satin on Neck
WEIGHT : 3.77kg (8.31lbs)

***
PAYMENT
Because Reverb Payment is not available to Japan, we can only accept PayPal payments.
Please confirm you are signed in to your account and using your registered PayPal address when paying.
Guest accounts and/or unverified addresses fall out of buyer/seller protection and we may have to cancel your order.

SHIPPING
Normally we send items by EMS or FedEx.
Feel free to contact us if shipping isn't shown on an item page.
Customs duties (import tax) aren't included in the item price or shipping cost.
We do not undervalue items on custom forms.

item.title: Schecter C-4 Standard electric bass in Tobacco Burl — $449
item.description:
$449 · Brand New · Town Center Music

The Schecter C-4 Standard in Tobacco Burl Boutique Aesthetics Meets Active Low-End

At Town Center Music, we believe that a bass should do more than just hold down the low end—it should command the stage. The Schecter C-4 Standard in Tobacco Burl is a masterclass in modern bass design, offering a "stop-and-stare" visual appeal paired with a versatile active electronics package. While many basses in this class stick to traditional spruce or ash, Schecter has pushed the envelope by combining a resonant mahogany body with an exotic burl top. This is a bass for the player who wants the warmth of a vintage instrument and the surgical precision of a modern active circuit.

The C-4 body shape is legendary for its comfort and balance. With its sleek contours and deep cutaways, it offers effortless access to every inch of the fretboard. Whether you’re laying down a thick groove in the pocket or tapping out a melodic solo, the C-4 Standard provides a stable, ergonomic platform that feels natural from the very first note.

Exotic Woods: Mahogany Resonance and Tobacco Burl Beauty

The heart of the C-4 Standard’s tone lies in its solid mahogany body. Mahogany is the preferred choice for bassists seeking a "thick" and "punchy" response. It provides a natural compression that smooths out your attack while emphasizing a rich midrange that helps your bass lines sit perfectly in a dense mix. To elevate the instrument to a professional aesthetic, Schecter has capped the body with a highly figured burl top.

The Tobacco Burl finish is truly unique; because of the organic nature of burl wood, no two instruments look exactly alike. The dark, swirling patterns of the wood grain are highlighted by the Tobacco burst, giving the bass an "earthy" yet sophisticated look. Black one-ply binding frames the body, adding a crisp, modern edge to the organic wood textures.

Professional Playability: Roasted Maple Neck and Ebony Fretboard

Stability is the hallmark of a great bass, which is why the C-4 Standard features a roasted maple neck. The multi-piece construction makes the neck significantly more resistant to the "warping" that can occur with humidity changes—a critical feature for musicians gigging in the variable Georgia climate. The bolt-on construction provides a percussive "snap" and immediate note response that slap-bass players and fingerstyle technicians will love.

Topping the neck is a genuine rosewood fretboard. Usually reserved for much higher-priced instruments, rosewood provides a smooth playing surface and a bright, percussive tonal contribution. Armed with 24 X-Jumbo frets and abalone dot inlays, the C-4 Standard offers two full octaves of range. The 34-inch scale length ensures the strings have the perfect amount of tension for standard tuning or dropping down for heavier styles.

Active Tone Shaping: Schecter Diamond Bass Pickups

While the woods provide the character, the electronics provide the versatility. The C-4 Standard is equipped with a pair of Schecter Diamond Bass humbuckers. These pickups are designed to be high-output and incredibly quiet, capturing the full frequency range of the instrument without unwanted hum or interference. But the real power lies in the Active 2-Band EQ.

The onboard active circuit allows you to boost or cut both your Bass and Treble frequencies. This transforms the C-4 into a sonic chameleon: you can crank the bass for a massive, dub-like thump, or boost the treble for a "clanky," metallic attack that cuts through a high-gain wall of guitars. With Master Volume and Blend controls, you can find the perfect sweet spot between the punchy bridge pickup and the warm, rounded neck pickup in seconds.

Rock-Solid Hardware for the Road

At Town Center Music, we know that reliability is non-negotiable. The C-4 Standard is outfitted with a Schecter Diamond Bass bridge, a heavy-duty unit that ensures massive vibrational transfer to the body while allowing for precise intonation. The Schecter tuners feature a 17:1 gear ratio, providing smooth and accurate tuning that holds up through aggressive sets. All hardware is finished in a sleek Black Chrome, perfectly complementing the Tobacco Burl aesthetic.

Why Choose the C-4 Standard from Town Center Music

Buying a bass is an investment in your rhythmic identity. At Town Center Music, we treat every instrument with the care it deserves. Every Schecter C-4 Standard in our shop is stored in a climate-controlled environment and undergoes a rigorous inspection & setup (a $75 value, FREE!) by our team of musicians before it ever reaches your hands. We are an authorized Schecter dealer, and we take pride in offering the expertise and community support you need to make your musical journey a success.

Step up to a bass that looks as good as it sounds. Experience the boutique vibe and active power of the Schecter C-4 Standard in Tobacco Burl today. Available now at Town Center Music.

All fretted instruments come with a full setup before shipping - a $75 value, FREE! Town Center Music has been providing our Reverb customers with great service since 2015 to great success. Check our seller rating, and buy with confidence. Still have questions? Feel free to give our Atlanta-area store a call at 770.831.7936.

item.title: Schecter Omen Extreme-4 electric bass in Gloss Natural — $699
item.description:
$699 · Brand New · Town Center Music

The Schecter Omen Extreme-4 in Gloss Natural Elegance Meets Low-End Power

At Town Center Music, we know that a bass player's role is twofold: you are the rhythmic heartbeat and the melodic foundation of the band. To do that job well, you need an instrument that is as versatile as it is powerful. Enter the Schecter Omen Extreme-4 in a stunning Gloss Natural finish. This bass isn't just about good looks—though the quilted maple top certainly turns heads—it’s about providing the modern player with an active tonal palette that can handle everything from smooth jazz walks to aggressive metal clank. It is a "boutique-style" powerhouse that fits comfortably into any budget.

The Omen Extreme series has long been the gold standard for value in the Schecter lineup. By combining high-grade tonewoods with professional-grade active electronics, Schecter has created a four-string that feels substantial, plays fast, and sounds absolutely massive.

Premium Tonewoods for a Richer Response

The foundation of the Omen Extreme-4's sound starts with its solid mahogany body. Mahogany is legendary in the bass world for its "warm" and "thick" character. It provides a resonant low-midrange that helps your notes sit perfectly in a live mix without getting lost. To add a layer of high-end definition and a whole lot of visual flair, Schecter caps the mahogany with a highly figured quilted maple top.

In the Gloss Natural finish, the "quilt" of the maple is the star of the show. It gives the bass an organic, high-end aesthetic that is usually reserved for instruments costing three times as much. The body is further elevated by creme multi-ply binding, which frames the natural wood grain beautifully and gives the instrument a finished, professional look that stands out under stage lights.

Effortless Playability: The 6-Bolt Maple Neck

A bass is only as good as its neck, and Schecter has perfected the "Thin C" profile on the Omen Extreme-4. The maple neck is attached via a 6-bolt construction, ensuring maximum vibrational transfer from the strings to the body for enhanced sustain. This design provides a rock-solid feel that inspires confidence during high-energy performances.

The rosewood fretboard adds a touch of classic warmth to the attack and features 24 X-Jumbo frets. These larger frets make it incredibly easy to fret notes with minimal pressure, which is a godsend during long four-set nights. Navigating the 34-inch scale is a breeze thanks to the Abalone and Pearloid Vector inlays. These unique markers serve as a sophisticated roadmap across the fretboard, ensuring you never lose your place during a complex fill or a frantic solo.

Active Tone Shaping: Schecter Diamond Bass Pickups

While the woods provide the soul, the electronics provide the muscle. The Omen Extreme-4 is equipped with two Schecter Diamond Bass humbucking pickups. These pickups are designed to be high-output and low-noise, providing a clean canvas for your tone. But the real magic happens in the Active 2-Band EQ circuit.

Unlike passive basses that only allow you to cut frequencies, the active EQ on the Omen Extreme-4 allows you to boost or cut both Treble and Bass. Need more "thump" for a reggae groove Boost the bass. Need more "snap" for a slap bass solo Crank the treble. With dedicated Master Volume and Blend controls, you can dial in the perfect balance between the neck and bridge pickups in seconds. Whether you’re plugging into a massive stadium rig or a small studio interface, this active system ensures you have total control over your frequency footprint.

Rock-Solid Hardware for the Working Pro

At Town Center Music, we understand that nothing kills a performance faster than tuning issues. That’s why we appreciate the hardware choices Schecter made for the Omen Extreme-4. It features a Diamond Bass bridge that allows for precise intonation and provides a heavy-duty anchor for the strings, contributing to the guitar's impressive sustain. The Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut ensures that the strings never bind, keeping your tuning stable even during aggressive playing styles.

The Schecter tuners provide a smooth, 17:1 gear ratio for micro-adjustments, and the black chrome hardware adds a modern, "stealthy" edge to the Gloss Natural aesthetic. This is a bass that is built to be played hard, night after night.

Why Buy Your Schecter from Town Center Music

Buying a bass is an investment in your craft. When you choose Town Center Music, you aren't just getting an instrument in a box. Our team of musicians inspects and sets up (a $75 value, FREE!) every Schecter Omen Extreme-4 that comes through our doors. We check the electronics, the fretwork, and the finish to ensure it meets our high standards. We store our instruments in a climate-controlled environment so that the mahogany and maple stay in peak condition until the moment you pick it up.

Stop settling for a "beginner" bass and step up to a professional-grade powerhouse. Experience the beauty and the bite of the Schecter Omen Extreme-4 in Gloss Natural today.

All fretted instruments come with a full setup before shipping - a $75 value, FREE! Town Center Music has been providing our Reverb customers with great service since 2015 to great success. Check our seller rating, and buy with confidence. Still have questions? Feel free to give our Atlanta-area store a call at 770.831.7936.

item.title: Washburn WCBM15SEK Comfort Series Solid Cedar Top Mahogany Neck 4-String Acoustic-Electric Mini Bass Guitar w/Armrest & Gig Bag — $499
item.description:
$499 · Brand New · The Gator Tone

Washburn’s Comfort Series is built around one idea: every detail should make the instrument feel better, play easier, and inspire more music. The WCBM15SEK Mini Comfort Bass brings that philosophy to a compact, travel‑friendly acoustic‑electric bass designed for effortless playability and surprisingly full low‑end response.

This satin‑finished “Mini” bass features a solid cedar top paired with striped ebony back and sides, a tonewood combination chosen for warmth, clarity, and rich harmonic depth. Walnut binding accents the body, while the Comfort Series armrest and sculpted Carve‑Away work together to reduce fatigue and keep you playing longer.

Barcus‑Berry electronics provide reliable, stage‑ready amplified tone, and the Aquila bass strings deliver a balanced, expressive voice right out of the box.

Despite its smaller footprint, the WCBM15SEK produces a surprisingly big, musical low end — perfect for recording, couch playing, or taking on the road. Gig bag included.

Specifications:

Body & Construction

  • Back: Striped Ebony.
  • Bracing: Quarter-Sawn Scalloped Sitka Spruce.
  • Rosette: Washburn Parquet, 3-Ring.
  • Body Shape: G Mini.
  • Sides: Striped Ebony.
  • Top: Solid Cedar with Armrest.
  • Type: Mini Bass.

Neck

  • Fretboard: Laurel.
  • Inlays: Dots.
  • Neck: Satin Mahogany with 2-Way Truss Rod.
  • Number of Frets: 20.
  • Nut: NuBone.
  • Scale Length: 28.6".

Other

  • Color: Natural Matte.
  • Finish: Satin.
  • Strings: Aquila.
  • Includes: Gig Bag.

item.title: B.C. Rich NJ Series Warlock Bass 1985 - Lime Green MIJ — $1,599
item.description:
$1,599 · Very Good · Chris Carroll

In good working order. Chip pictured on the top left point. Bottom points are in good shape. Original custom pickups and Gotoh tuners. Does not come with gig bag. Missing truss rod cover.

item.title: 2004 Fender American Series Precision Bass — $1,111
item.description:
$1,111 · Very Good · Kennys

A very clean bass. It comes with the original case and paperwork and strap. It is set up and playing very nice. There are no issues with it. Alder body. Maple neck. Rosewood fretboard. The deluxe tuners hold it in tune very well.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man USA StingRay Special 5 H - 2025 - Xiavier Matte Green — $1,950
item.description:
$1,950 · Very Good · Luke's Guitar Shop

This is a 2025 Ernie Ball Music Man USA Stingray Special 5H Bass. A special order bass to be similar to the the Tim Commerford signature model with Xiavier green matte finish with matte black hardware, white pickguard, roasted Maple neck and Ebony fretboard. This bass has some small nicks/scratches around the edges but overall is still in very good condition.  The frets are in perfect shape and it plays cleanly up and down the neck with good action and no buzzes or issues.  The original EQ and controls all work as they should.  It comes with the original case. The weight on this one is 8.55 lbs. Please let me know if you have any questions. No trade offers please. Thank you!

item.title: Fender Japan Steve Harris Signature Precision Bass - CIJ - Iron Maiden - Lake Placid Blue — $2,095
item.description:
$2,095 · Very Good · Luke's Guitar Shop

This is a Japanese built Fender Steve Harris Signature model P-Bass.  A very hard to find model that was built from 1999-2002 and features a Lake placid blue finish with a factory loaded Seymour Duncan pickup. This bass has some small nicks/scratches and I see a couple dings on the edge of the body and finish chips at the strap button but overall is still in very good condition.  The pickguard has been changed to a silver anodized guard and it has a Hipshot drop tuner installed (I don't have the original parts). The frets are in excellent shape and it plays cleanly up and down the neck with good action and no buzzes or issues.  The controls and pickups work as they should and it sounds great! It comes in a new padded gig bag.  The weight is 9.02 lbs. Please let me know if you have any questions. No trade offers please. Thank you.

item.title: 2022 Fender MIM Loaded P Bass body EMG GZR Hipshot Bridge — $375
item.description:
$375 · Good · Alex's Gear Locker

Up for sale is a loaded 2022 Fender P bass body ready for a neck. Was gonna make it into a project that i was really looking forward to building but bills happened so off to a better home.

Serial Number- MO5842740

EMG GZR P pickup with 1 volume and 1 tone

2 metal set screw knobs

Hipshot Kickass bridge with black saddles and brass inserts

Carmedon P Bass pickguard

Fender "F" neckplate with 4 neck screws

item.title: 1966 Fender Mustang Bass- Dakota Red, good condition, w/ case — $4,300
item.description:
$4,300 · Very Good · Sid's Gear Garage

1966 Dakota Red Fender Mustang Bass. This bass is in good to very good condition, minimal wear for an instrument of this vintage, the neck is nice and straight, the frets are in good shape, and it plays well. All electronics work fine. Comes with original hard shell case which does have some wear but the latches work and it protects the instrument as it should.

Included are pics of the neck heel, neck plate and pot codes which verify it's age.
